$description: Component tokens for Mobile Alert component - a contextual notification banner that communicates status, warnings, errors, or feature updates. Supports 5 color variants (Primary, Gray, Error, Warning, Success), 2 emphasis levels (Medium = light background with colored text, High = dark saturated background with white text), 2 layout modes (card = full block, inline = compact row), and 2 action directions (Below = actions stacked below text, Right = actions beside text). Figma Reference: Node ID 429-10491

$component.name: Alert
$component.description: A mobile alert/notification component used to communicate important information, status updates, warnings, or errors. Features a left semantic icon, heading and description text, an optional dismiss button, and optional action buttons (filled primary + outline secondary). Adjusts layout and typography between card (full-width block) and inline (compact row) display modes.
$component.structure: Horizontal flex container with optional semantic icon (20px), flex content column (heading + supporting text + optional actions), and optional close/dismiss button. Card mode uses 8px gap; inline mode uses 4px gap. Shadow and 8px rounded corners apply to all variants.

color.primary: Brand blue — feature announcements and primary informational alerts
color.gray: Neutral gray — general information, secondary context, or subtle notices
color.error: Error red — critical issues, failures, or destructive action confirmations
color.warning: Warning orange — cautionary messages, potential issues, degraded states
color.success: Success green — completed actions, confirmations, positive outcomes

emphasis.medium: Light background with colored text — subtle, non-intrusive. Default emphasis.
emphasis.high: Dark/saturated background with white text — prominent, attention-demanding

layout.card: Full-width block layout — icon + stacked content + optional dismiss. Standard alert treatment.
layout.inline: Compact row layout — tighter gaps, smaller typography, 28px buttons. Used inside dense UIs.

actionDirection.below: Action buttons render below the heading and supporting text
actionDirection.right: Action buttons render inline to the right of text content

usage.contexts: Mobile app notifications, form validation feedback, system status messages, onboarding notices, feature announcements, destructive action warnings
usage.features: 5 semantic color variants, 2 emphasis levels, optional icon, optional dismiss button, optional Learn More link, optional action buttons (filled + outline), card and inline layout modes

container.$comment: Outer container tokens — shared across all color variants and emphasis levels

padding.description: Mobile alert container padding - 4px all sides

card.description: Mobile alert card layout gap between icon, content area, and close button - 8px

inline.description: Mobile alert inline layout gap between icon, content area, and close button - 4px (tighter)

shadow.description: Mobile alert container shadow - shadow/xs - 0px 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.06)

icon.$comment: Left semantic icon — represents the alert type (info, error, warning, success)

content.$comment: Content area — heading row and supporting text paragraph

gap.description: Mobile alert gap between heading and supporting text - 2px

typography.$comment: Typography tokens vary between card (larger) and inline (smaller) layout modes

card.description: Mobile alert heading typography for card layout - 14px Semibold, 20px line-height (font/size/lg, font/weight/semibold)

inline.description: Mobile alert heading typography for inline layout - 13px Medium, 18px line-height (font/size/md, font/weight/medium)

card.description: Mobile alert supporting text typography for card layout - 13px Regular, 18px line-height (font/size/md, font/weight/regular)

inline.description: Mobile alert supporting text typography for inline layout - 12px Regular, 17px line-height (font/size/sm, font/weight/regular)

close.$comment: Dismiss/close button base tokens. Border and text colors are per-variant (see variants section).

background.description: Mobile alert close button background - white - #ffffff (consistent across all variants)

radius.description: Mobile alert close button border radius - 8px

width.description: Mobile alert close button border width - 1px

shadow.description: Mobile alert close button shadow - shadow/xs - 0px 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.05)

typography.description: Mobile alert close/dismiss button label typography - 14px Semibold, 20px line-height

actions.$comment: Action button area tokens — separate sizes for card (below) and inline (right) layouts

gap.description: Mobile alert gap between action buttons - 8px

card.$comment: Card layout action buttons (actionDirection=Below) — standard 36px height

height.description: Mobile alert card action button height - 36px

horizontal.description: Mobile alert card action button horizontal padding - 14px

vertical.description: Mobile alert card action button vertical padding - 8px

gap.description: Mobile alert card action button internal gap (between icon and label) - 8px

radius.description: Mobile alert card action button border radius - 8px

typography.description: Mobile alert card action button typography - 14px Semibold, 20px line-height

inline.$comment: Inline layout action buttons (actionDirection=Right) — compact 28px height

height.description: Mobile alert inline action button height - 28px

padding.description: Mobile alert inline action button padding - 8px all sides

gap.description: Mobile alert inline action button internal gap (between icon and label) - 6px

radius.description: Mobile alert inline action button border radius - 4px (tighter for compact layout)

typography.description: Mobile alert inline action button typography - 12px Semibold, 17px line-height

variants.$comment: Per-color-variant tokens. Each variant covers medium/high emphasis container backgrounds, text/icon colors, and action button color pairs (filled = primary action, outline = secondary action). Raw hex values used for semantic color families.
